purpose: Core DM logic: encrypt/decrypt, seal/wrap, NIP-59 operations, and (story-01) the lenient inbound payload parser that never returns null for non-empty decrypted strings.

public_api.name: parseDirectPayload
public_api.signature: (raw: string) => { content: string; attachments?: RoledAttachments; } | null
public_api.description: Parses a decrypted DM payload. Four-tier priority: (1) JSON text-envelope → {content}, (2) JSON image-envelope → {content, attachments}, (3) JSON unknown shape → {content: raw}, (4) JSON parse error → {content: raw}. raw === '' returns null. Logs 'dm:parse-lenient-fallback' at info level for cases 3 and 4.

public_api.name: decryptDirectPayload
public_api.signature: (encrypted: string, privateKeyHex: string, peerPubkeyHex: string) => Promise<{ content: string; attachments?: RoledAttachments; } | null>
public_api.description: Decrypts a NIP-04 ciphertext and passes it to parseDirectPayload. Logs 'dm:decrypt-empty' at info level when decryption fails or decrypted content is empty.

public_api.name: shouldIngestRumor
public_api.description: Thread-isolation guard for gift-wrap inbound path. Returns true when rumor.pubkey === peerPubkeyHex. Logs 'dm:rumor-rejected' at info level when returning false.

public_api.name: unwrapAndOpen
public_api.description: Unwraps a NIP-59 gift wrap and returns the inner rumor. Throws on failure. Logs 'dm:unwrap-failed' at info level before re-throwing.

owned_data: unwrapAndOpen — nip59 unwrap with auth steps
dependencies_forbidden: console.warn — no warn calls in any new or modified path (AC-31)
console.error — no error calls in any new or modified path (AC-31)
test_targets: app/tests/unit/directMessages.test.ts — AC-01, AC-02, AC-03, AC-04, AC-05, AC-06, AC-31
